text: ELINT News RT @lookner : Bloomberg Economics analysts believe the blockade is an attempt by Trump to "escalate to deescalate" but Iran "will see the blockade as an act of war" https://www.bloomberg.com/news/live-blog/2026-04-12/iran-war-live-updates-hormuz-us-blockade?cursorId=69DC239B69700007 https://twitter.com/lookner/status/2043465429113315591/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @lookner ：彭博经济学分析师认为，此次封锁是特朗普试图“以升级求降级”，但伊朗“会将封锁视为战争行为” https://www.bloomberg.com/news/live-blog/2026-04-12/iran-war-live-updates-hormuz-us-blockade?cursorId=69DC239B69700007 https://twitter.com/lookner/status/2043465429113315591/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Skyhorse Publishing to start a new imprint in partnership with Tucker Carlson, called "Tucker Carlson Books," featuring an inaugural lineup that includes Russell Brand, Milo Yiannopoulos, and Dr. Patrick Soon-Shiong — WSJ tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 天马出版公司（Skyhorse Publishing）将与塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）合作成立一家名为“塔克·卡尔森图书”（Tucker Carlson Books）的新出版品牌，首批阵容包括拉塞尔·布兰德（Russell Brand）、米洛·扬诺普洛斯（Milo Yiannopoulos）和帕特里克·孙祥博士（Dr. Patrick Soon-Shiong）——《华尔街日报》推文

text: WarMonitor This is how regional wars become global ones. For you all who think the US naval blockade will be successful just bc we have US Navy ships in the gulf … Ask yourself this. Are we going to sink Chinese, Indian and Pakistani merchant ships defying the blockade or just write their names down and cry? This will be unenforceable and speed up the collapse of the global economy. This is Madness disguised as a policy. - Malcolm Nance tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这就是地区战争演变为全球战争的方式。对于你们这些认为美国海军封锁会成功的人，仅仅因为我们在海湾有美国海军舰艇……问问自己。我们要击沉那些无视封锁的中国、印度和巴基斯坦商船，还是只是记下它们的名字然后哭泣？这将无法执行，并会加速全球经济的崩溃。这是一种伪装成政策的疯狂。 - 马尔科姆·南斯（Malcolm Nance）推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Southern Command: "Applying total systemic friction on the cartels. On April 11, at the direction of SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted two lethal kinetic strikes on two vessels operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessels were transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and were engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Two male narco-terrorists were killed, and one narco-terrorist survived the first strike. Three male narco-terrorists were killed during the second strike. Following the engagements, USSOUTHCOM immediately notified U.S. Coast Guard to activate the Search and Rescue system for the survivor. No U.S. military forces were harmed." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国南方司令部：“对卡特尔施加全面的系统性摩擦。4月11日，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万（Francis L. Donovan）将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队（Joint Task Force Southern Spear）对两个由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了两次致命的动力打击。情报证实，这些船只正在东太平洋已知的毒品走私路线上航行，并参与了毒品走私活动。两名男性毒品恐怖分子被击毙，一名毒品恐怖分子在第一次打击中幸存。在第二次打击中，三名男性毒品恐怖分子被击毙。交战后，美国南方司令部立即通知美国海岸警卫队为幸存者启动搜救系统。没有美国军事力量受到伤害。”推文

text: 🇺🇸 JD Vance says the goal is getting Iran to commit to not build a nuclear weapon. It already made that commitment in 2015 under the JCPOA—a deal T rump tore up. Now this admin has dragged the country into a pointless war to recover ground it gave away—and American families are paying the price.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD·万斯（JD Vance）表示，目标是让伊朗承诺不制造核武器。它在2015年的《伊核协议》（JCPOA）下已经做出了这一承诺——这是一项被特朗普撕毁的协议。现在，本届政府为了收复它放弃的阵地，将国家拖入了一场毫无意义的战争——而美国民众正在为此付出代价。

text: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 SCMP: NATO is set to send around 30 representatives to Tokyo this month for talks with Japan, highlighting deepening security cooperation between the two sides. The meetings are expected to focus on China’s expanding regional influence and Russia’s war in Ukraine, as well as broader global security concerns. The visit will also include discussions with Japan’s defense industry and comes as both sides increase coordination in response to shifting geopolitical tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 《南华早报》：北约计划本月派遣约30名代表前往东京与日本进行会谈，凸显了双方日益深化的安全合作。会议预计将重点讨论中国不断扩大的地区影响力、俄罗斯在乌克兰的战争，以及更广泛的全球安全关切。此次访问还将包括与日本国防工业的讨论，正值双方为应对不断变化的地缘政治紧张局势而加强协调之际。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Southern Command says Joint Task Force Southern Spear carried out two strikes on vessels linked to designated criminal groups along narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific. Five individuals were killed across the two strikes, with one survivor from the first strike, as U.S. authorities activated search and rescue efforts. No U.S. personnel were harmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国南方司令部表示，南方之矛联合特遣部队在东太平洋的毒品走私路线上对与指定犯罪集团有关联的船只进行了两次打击。两次打击共造成五人死亡，第一次打击中有一名幸存者，美国当局已启动搜救工作。没有美国人员受到伤害。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor RT @lookner : Bloomberg Economics analysts believe the blockade is an attempt by Trump to "escalate to deescalate" but Iran "will see the blockade as an act of war" https://www.bloomberg.com/news/live-blog/2026-04-12/iran-war-live-updates-hormuz-us-blockade?cursorId=69DC239B69700007 https://twitter.com/lookner/status/2043465429113315591/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @lookner ：彭博经济学分析师认为，此次封锁是特朗普试图“以升级求降级”，但伊朗“会将封锁视为战争行为” https://www.bloomberg.com/news/live-blog/2026-04-12/iran-war-live-updates-hormuz-us-blockade?cursorId=69DC239B69700007 https://twitter.com/lookner/status/2043465429113315591/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Israeli media, including Ynet, Channel 12, and Kan, are reporting that the IDF is gearing up for renewed conflict with Iran — Times of Israel tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 包括Ynet、第12频道和Kan在内的以色列媒体报道称，以色列国防军（IDF）正在为与伊朗的重新冲突做准备 ——《以色列时报》推文

text: WarMonitor The blockade plan, if you can call it that, clearly wasn’t thought through. @Mpolymer Uh. What are we going to do when a Chinese ship defies the blockade? Shoot at it? I think not. - Malcolm Nance tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 封锁计划，如果这也能叫计划的话，显然没有经过深思熟虑。 @Mpolymer 嗯。当中国船只无视封锁时我们该怎么办？向它开火？我想不会。 - 马尔科姆·南斯（Malcolm Nance）推文

text: WarMonitor If strikes and a blockade of the blockade are the only options left, there are no more exit ramps, only rising costs. President Trump and his advisers are looking at resuming limited military strikes in Iran in addition to the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz as a way to break a stalemate in peace talks, according to officials and people familiar with the situation. https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/trump-weighs-limited-strikes-on-iran-after-talks-collapse-71908883?st=eskYn6 - Alex Ward tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 如果打击和封锁封锁是仅剩的选项，那么就没有退路了，只有不断上升的成本。据官员和知情人士透露，特朗普总统及其顾问正在考虑在对霍尔木兹海峡进行美国封锁之外，恢复对伊朗的有限军事打击，以此作为打破和平谈判僵局的一种方式。 https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/trump-weighs-limited-strikes-on-iran-after-talks-collapse-71908883?st=eskYn6 - 亚历克斯·沃德（Alex Ward）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷Australian Prime Minister Albanese says that Australia hasn't received an invitation from U.S. President Trump to support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Reporter: "Trump says a lot of things, of course, but he also said this morning that numerous…" ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Australian Prime Minister Albanese emphasized that he wants peace talks to resume. "Well, I wanna see the resumption of peace talks. We wanna see an end to this conflict. It's having a devastating impact on the global economy. And the longer it goes, the bigger the impact will be and the longer the tail will be as well. And so we want to see an end to the conflict. We've made that very clear for some time." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷澳大利亚总理阿尔巴尼斯（Albanese）表示，澳大利亚尚未收到美国总统特朗普关于支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡的邀请。记者：“特朗普当然说了不少话，但他今天早上也说，许多……” ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 澳大利亚总理阿尔巴尼斯强调，他希望和平谈判能够恢复。“嗯，我希望看到和平谈判的恢复。我们希望看到这场冲突的结束。它对全球经济产生了毁灭性的影响。持续的时间越长，影响就越大，后续的负面影响也会持续更久。所以我们希望看到冲突结束。我们已经明确表达这一立场有一段时间了。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Australian Prime Minister Albanese says that Australia hasn't received an invitation from U.S. President Trump to support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Reporter: "Trump says a lot of things, of course, but he also said this morning that numerous countries are going to help with this blockade. Has Australia been asked to help?" Albanese: "We haven't been asked to help. What we have done is continue to provide support. I've extended the period of service of our Wedgetail aircraft in the Middle East that's providing defensive support particularly to The UAE and to Gulf countries that aren't participants in the war but have been victims of it as a result of Iran's unprovoked attacks." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 澳大利亚总理阿尔巴尼斯表示，澳大利亚尚未收到美国总统特朗普关于支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡的邀请。记者：“特朗普当然说了不少话，但他今天早上也说，许多国家将协助此次封锁。澳大利亚是否被要求提供协助？”阿尔巴尼斯：“我们没有被要求提供协助。我们所做的是继续提供支持。我延长了我们在中东的楔尾预警机（Wedgetail aircraft）的服务期限，该机正在提供防御性支持，特别是针对阿联酋和海湾国家，这些国家虽然不是战争的参与者，但由于伊朗的无端袭击，它们已成为受害者。” @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 As Israel–Spain tensions intensify, Spain’s ambassador to Iran, upon arriving at the Iran’s Astara border, calls for “bilateral cooperation” and “lasting peace” — Fars. Adds that economic and investment relations will be reviewed.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 随着以色列与西班牙紧张局势加剧，西班牙驻伊朗大使在抵达伊朗阿斯塔拉（Astara）边境时呼吁进行“双边合作”和“持久和平” —— 法尔斯通讯社（Fars）。并补充说，经济和投资关系将进行审查。

text: Didn't report what the Lebanese PM said today because I didn't bother read it. He is a nobody that isn't worth the dirt on a shoe used to walk inside sewage
text_zh: 没有报道黎巴嫩总理今天说了什么，因为我懒得读。他是个无名小卒，不值得用来形容走在污水里的鞋底上的泥土

text: ‘To avoid destabilizing the region’ Yeah buddy I got news for you…
text_zh: ‘为了避免破坏该地区稳定’ 是啊，伙计，我有个消息要告诉你……

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: A massive amount of aerial assets is going to the Middle East @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：大量空中资产正在前往中东 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 The Easter truce between Russia and Ukraine has officially ended. Clashes, FPV attacks have mostly ceased during the weekend with some exceptions. No glide bombs or drone were launched. This evening the launch of drones has already resumed. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukraine and Russia both accused each other of ceasefire violations in the thousands as the Easter ceasefire came to an end. Ukraine accused Russia of 7,696 ceasefire violations in total. Specific violations include: 1,355 artillery strikes 115 assaults operations 6,226 drone strikes (1,677 Italmas, Lancet, and Molniya. 4,549 FPV drones.) Ukraine noted that no missile strikes or Geran-2 strikes were recorded during the ceasefire. Russia rejected that they hasd violated the ceasefire, claiming that all of their troops participating in the war stayed in their positions. They accuse Ukraine of 1,971 ceasefire violations during the Easter ceasefire, including four attempts to advance on Russian positions along the frontline such as in Kondratovka, Nova Sech, in the Sumy region (the latter of which they made two assault attempts), and Kaleniki in the Donetsk region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的复活节停火已正式结束。周末期间，冲突和FPV攻击大多已停止，但有少数例外。没有发射滑翔炸弹或无人机。今晚无人机发射已经恢复。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 随着复活节停火结束，乌克兰和俄罗斯均指责对方数千次违反停火协议。乌克兰指责俄罗斯总共违反停火协议7,696次。具体违规行为包括：1,355次炮击，115次突击行动，6,226次无人机袭击（1,677次Italmas、Lancet和Molniya无人机。4,549次FPV无人机。）乌克兰指出，停火期间没有记录到导弹袭击或Geran-2袭击。俄罗斯否认违反了停火协议，声称所有参与战争的部队都留在了各自的阵地。他们指责乌克兰在复活节停火期间违反停火协议1,971次，包括四次试图推进前线俄罗斯阵地，例如在苏梅地区的孔德拉托夫卡（Kondratovka）、新塞赫（Nova Sech）（后者进行了两次突击尝试），以及顿涅茨克地区的卡列尼基（Kaleniki）。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "Two soldiers of the 98th Division were moderately injured in a Hezbollah rocket attack in southern Lebanon on Sunday, the military says." This is the result of Hezbullah's main mode of attacks this war with concentrating rocket fire not Israel but on Israeli forces in Lebanon where they are known where and have no AD They mentioned two but give it a few days and you will hear that Israeli casualties are closer to 800 now. Last time it suddenly jumped to 500 when they were barely reporting a injury or two every other time However it stays painful for us that there are no Israeli army deaths (at least being reported for those who think Israel hides deaths)
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“军方称，周日黎巴嫩南部发生真主党火箭弹袭击，第98师两名士兵中度受伤。” 这是真主党在这场战争中的主要攻击模式的结果，他们集中的火箭弹火力不是针对以色列，而是针对在黎巴嫩的以色列军队，因为他们知道这些军队的位置且没有防空系统。他们提到了两名伤员，但再过几天你就会听到以色列的伤亡人数接近800了。上次伤亡人数突然跳升到500时，他们之前几乎每次只报道一两名伤员。然而，没有以色列军队死亡的消息（至少对于那些认为以色列隐瞒死亡人数的人来说，这仍然让我们感到痛苦）

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : JUST IN 🔴 Iran’s parliament speaker responds to Trump’s naval blockade: • “Americans must decide whether they are ready to earn Iran’s trust or not.” • “Trump’s recent threats have no effect on the Iranian nation, we have proven it.” • “We had very intensive, serious, and challenging talks… we presented strong initiatives that showed goodwill and led to progress.” • “We do not trust the Americans… they must earn our trust, and that is difficult due to their past actions.” • “The Iranian nation is advancing on its path and relies on its own capabilities.” • “Our delegation was united, serious, and creative in defending Iran’s rights.” • “These threats have no effect… this is not a slogan, the world has seen it.” • “If America wants a way out, it must earn the trust of the Iranian nation.” • “If you fight, we will fight, and if you come with logic, we will respond with logic.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转发 @Osint613 ：最新消息 🔴 伊朗议会议长回应特朗普的海军封锁：“美国人必须决定他们是否准备好赢得伊朗的信任。” • “特朗普最近的威胁对伊朗民族没有影响，我们已经证明了这一点。” • “我们进行了非常深入、严肃和具有挑战性的会谈……我们提出了强有力的倡议，显示了善意并取得了进展。” • “我们不信任美国人……他们必须赢得我们的信任，由于他们过去的所作所为，这很困难。” • “伊朗民族正在自己的道路上前行，并依靠自己的能力。” • “我们的代表团在捍卫伊朗权利方面是团结、严肃和富有创造力的。” • “这些威胁没有影响……这不是口号，世界已经看到了。” • “如果美国想要出路，它必须赢得伊朗民族的信任。” • “如果你战斗，我们就会战斗；如果你讲逻辑，我们就会以逻辑回应。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani says being a socialist is nothing to be ashamed of, "we will not be ashamed of... standing steadfast alongside our trans neighbours... or fighting for immigrants targeted by ICE." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043466700935360816/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 纽约市市长佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）表示，作为一名社会主义者没什么可羞耻的，“我们不会因为……坚定地站在我们的跨性别邻居一边……或为被移民及海关执法局（ICE）针对的移民而战而感到羞耻。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043466700935360816/video/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 🇭🇺 With 95% of votes counted, Hungary’s map shows the opposition Tisza party crushing Fidesz 94–12 in constituencies. Péter Magyar has secured a 2/3 majority, asked President Tamás Sulyok and other Orbán loyalists to resign immediately, and announced his first visit to Warsaw. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043439587456844188/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @panyiszabolcs ：💥 🇭🇺 随着95%的选票统计完毕，匈牙利地图显示反对派蒂萨党（Tisza party）在选区以94比12压倒性击败青民盟（Fidesz）。彼得·马贾尔（Péter Magyar）已获得2/3多数席位，要求总统塔马斯·苏尤克（Tamás Sulyok）和其他欧尔班（Orbán）忠诚派立即辞职，并宣布了他的首次华沙之行。 https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043439587456844188/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @JakubKrupa : “Ruszkik haza!” on the Budapest metro. What a moment. https://twitter.com/JakubKrupa/status/2043429099855569330/video/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @JakubKrupa ：“俄罗斯人回家！”（Ruszkik haza!）在布达佩斯地铁上。多么震撼的时刻。 https://twitter.com/JakubKrupa/status/2043429099855569330/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Wars are won through strategy, not trial and error tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 战争是通过战略赢得的，而不是通过反复试验赢得的 推文

text: ELINT News RT @ZelenskyyUa : Congratulations to @magyarpeterMP and the TISZA party on their resounding victory. It is important when constructive approach prevails. Ukraine has always sought good-neighbourly relations with everyone in Europe and we are ready to advance our cooperation with Hungary. Europe and every European nation must get stronger, and millions of Europeans seek cooperation and stability. We are ready for meetings and joint constructive work for the benefit of both nations, as well as peace, security, and stability in Europe. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @ZelenskyyUa ：祝贺 @magyarpeterMP 和蒂萨党（TISZA party）取得辉煌胜利。当建设性的方法占上风时，这很重要。乌克兰一直寻求与欧洲所有人建立睦邻友好关系，我们准备推进与匈牙利的合作。欧洲和每个欧洲国家都必须变得更强大，数百万欧洲人寻求合作与稳定。我们准备好进行会晤和共同的建设性工作，以造福两国，以及欧洲的和平、安全与稳定。 推文

text: ELINT News RT @panyiszabolcs : 💥 🇭🇺 🗳️ BREAKING: Péter Magyar says Viktor Orbán called to concede and congratulate him. Magyar will be Hungary’s next prime minister and, as it stands, is set to secure a 2/3 supermajority – enough to fully dismantle Orbán’s system. A 16-year chapter is over. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043409289956544836/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @panyiszabolcs ：💥 🇭🇺 🗳️ 突发：彼得·马贾尔（Péter Magyar）表示维克多·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）已致电认输并向他表示祝贺。马贾尔将成为匈牙利下一任总理，按目前情况，他将获得2/3的绝对多数席位——足以彻底拆除欧尔班的体系。一个16年的篇章结束了。 https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043409289956544836/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @vonderleyen : Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. Magyarország Európát választotta. Európa mindig Magyarországot választotta. Egy ország visszatér az európai útjára. Az Unió erősebbé válik. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @vonderleyen ：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。Magyarország Európát választotta. Európa mindig Magyarországot választotta. Egy ország visszatér az európai útjára. Az Unió erősebbé válik. 推文

text: Open Source Intel Over 50 former staffers of U.S. Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) are calling for his immediate resignation and exit from the race for California governor. “The (sexual assault) allegations reported by the San Francisco Chronicle and CNN are serious, credible, and demand responsibility.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 超过50名美国众议员埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell，加州民主党）的前工作人员呼吁他立即辞职并退出加州州长竞选。“《旧金山纪事报》和CNN报道的（性侵犯）指控是严重的、可信的，需要承担责任。” 推文

text: BREAKING: CENTCOM says the U.S. will begin a naval blockade of all ships entering or leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10 a.m. ET.
text_zh: 突发：中央司令部（CENTCOM）表示，美国将于4月13日上午10点（东部时间）开始对所有进出伊朗港口的船只实施海军封锁。

text: And, oil prices up again.
text_zh: 而且，油价再次上涨。

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）：在47年来最高级别的密集会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遇到了极端主义、不断变化的立场和封锁。零教训被吸取。

text: Anthony Albanese, Australia’s prime minister, said the country hasn’t been asked to support a US Hormuz blockade.
text_zh: 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯（Anthony Albanese）表示，该国未被要求支持美国的霍尔木兹海峡封锁。

text: 🇺🇸 US forced to reactivate aging refueling aircraft amid conflict with Iran, with at least two KC-135s pulled from storage after reported losses and damage to six tankers. One of them (tail number 58-0011) was built in 1958 — about 68 years old. — Bild
text_zh: 🇺🇸 在与伊朗的冲突中，美国被迫重新启用老化的加油机，在据报道损失和损坏了六架加油机后，至少有两架KC-135从封存状态中拉出。其中一架（尾号58-0011）建于1958年——大约68岁。 — 《图片报》（Bild）

text: Trump met with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis earlier today.
text_zh: 特朗普今天早些时候会见了佛罗里达州州长罗恩·德桑蒂斯（Ron DeSantis）。

text: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Australia joins the UK in refusing to participate in a U.S. blockade of Iran.
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 澳大利亚加入英国行列，拒绝参与美国的伊朗封锁行动。

text: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 Australia has declined to participate in the US naval blockade on Iranian ports, in line with the UK’s earlier position. — Sky News Australia
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 澳大利亚已拒绝参与美国对伊朗港口的海军封锁，这与英国早先的立场一致。 — 澳大利亚天空新闻（Sky News Australia）

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Australia says it is not considering joining the U.S. naval blockade of the Hormuz Strait, "the best way to get lasting peace, and to ensure ultimately that petrol prices come down for Australians, is a negotiated settlement." — Sky Australia tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 澳大利亚表示不考虑加入美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海军封锁，“实现持久和平，并最终确保澳大利亚人的汽油价格下降的最佳方式，是通过谈判达成解决方案。” — 澳大利亚天空新闻（Sky Australia）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇬🇧🇮🇷 BREAKING: The UK says it will not take part in U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Trump claimed earlier today that ‘the UK will send warships to help, and probably other countries will too’. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 Australia has now joined the UK in refusing to join the U.S. blockade on Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇬🇧🇮🇷 突发：英国表示不会参与美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。特朗普今天早些时候声称‘英国将派遣军舰提供帮助，其他国家可能也会这样做’。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 澳大利亚现已加入英国行列，拒绝加入美国的伊朗封锁行动。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾 An unidentified military cargo plane was heard flying over rural southern Damascus. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Local sources in Daraa and Quenitra claim to have heard multiple Israeli helicopters flying eastward. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾 一架身份不明的军用货机被听到飞越大马士革南部农村地区。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 德拉（Daraa）和库奈特拉（Quenitra）的当地消息来源声称听到多架以色列直升机向东飞行。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 An unidentified military cargo plane was heard flying over rural southern Damascus. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 一架身份不明的军用货机被听到飞越大马士革南部农村地区。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Bloomberg: Hungarian Prime Minister Orban was told as recently as a few days ago that FIDESZ stood to win a majority in parliamentary elections. He conducted his weekly government meeting in good spirits on Wednesday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利蒂萨党（TISZA party）领导人彼得·马贾尔（Peter Magyar）报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电向他表示祝贺。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 彭博社：匈牙利总理欧尔班在几天前还被告知青民盟（FIDESZ）将在议会选举中赢得多数席位。周三，他在心情愉快的情况下主持了每周的政府会议。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar professed his voters' decision for Hungary to become a European country again, in which the crowd responded with "Russian's go home!": "Victory because our country has made a decision and wants to live again.…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar on Victor Orban congratulating him: "A little over an hour ago, the nearest prime minister, Viktor Orbán, called me on the phone, Viktor Orbán called me on the phone, and congratulated us on our victory." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马贾尔（Peter Magyar）宣称他的选民决定让匈牙利再次成为一个欧洲国家，人群回应‘俄罗斯人回家！’：“胜利是因为我们的国家做出了决定，想要再次生活……’” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马贾尔谈到维克多·欧尔班向他表示祝贺：“一个多小时前，最近的总理维克多·欧尔班给我打了电话，维克多·欧尔班给我打了电话，祝贺我们取得胜利。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The futures contracts for Brent crude oil jump to $102.60 per barrel, and US crude oil hits a record high of $105.25 per barrel.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 布伦特原油期货合约跳升至每桶102.60美元，美国原油创下每桶105.25美元的历史新高。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Commander of the Quds Force of the IRGC, Qa’ani: — The unified resistance front has a strong and effective presence throughout the region and is waiting for the enemies of humanity. — The US and the Zionist regime should remember how they fled empty-handed from heroic Yemen, Bab al-Mandeb, and the Red Sea. — Now they will leave the region without any achievements.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）圣城旅指挥官卡尼（Qa’ani）：— 统一的抵抗阵线在整个地区拥有强大而有效的存在，正在等待人类的敌人。— 美国和犹太复国主义政权应该记住他们是如何从英雄的也门、曼德海峡和红海空手而逃的。— 现在他们将离开该地区，没有任何成就。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇭🇺 Hungarian PM elect Peter Magyar on serving Hungary: “I will serve as long as it benefits the nation. I will do so as long as I can. God bless Hungary, God bless every good person.” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 Hungary Prime Minister elect Peter Magyar professed his voters' decision for Hungary to become a European country again, in which the crowd responded with "Russian's go home!": "Victory because our country has made a decision and wants to live again. It wants to be a European country again." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇭🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马贾尔谈到为匈牙利服务：“只要对国家有利，我就会服务。只要我能，我就会这样做。上帝保佑匈牙利，上帝保佑每一个好人。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 匈牙利当选总理彼得·马贾尔宣称他的选民决定让匈牙利再次成为一个欧洲国家，人群回应“俄罗斯人回家！”：“胜利是因为我们的国家做出了决定，想要再次生活。它想再次成为一个欧洲国家。” @wfwitness

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）：在47年来最高级别的密集会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遇到了极端主义、不断变化的立场和封锁。零教训被吸取。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran warns Americans to ‘enjoy’ today’s gas prices. Trump’s Hormuz ‘blockade’ will make Americans miss $4 gas. Speaker Ghalibaf posts map of gas stations near White House.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗警告美国人‘享受’今天的油价。特朗普的霍尔木兹‘封锁’将让美国人怀念4美元的油价。议长加利巴夫（Ghalibaf）发布了白宫附近的加油站地图。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及以色列北部对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Pentagon to blockade IRAN’S ports. — Applies to vessels of ALL nations, including China, Russia, India. — Covers all Iranian ports on the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. — CENTCOM says it will not impede transit through Hormuz to non-Iranian ports. — Mariners ordered to monitor Notice to Mariners broadcasts and contact US naval forces on channel 16. “Come closer. Iran will sink your ships.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 五角大楼将封锁伊朗港口。— 适用于所有国家的船只，包括中国、俄罗斯、印度。— 覆盖波斯湾和阿曼湾的所有伊朗港口。— 中央司令部（CENTCOM）表示，不会阻碍通过霍尔木兹海峡前往非伊朗港口的航行。— 海员被命令监控海员通知广播，并在16频道联系美国海军部队。“靠近点。伊朗会击沉你们的船。”

text: Trump is considering next steps against Iran. Options include limited military strikes. A full-scale bombing campaign is on the table but unlikely, since it could destabilize the region and lead to a prolonged conflict. The U.S. may also try a temporary Hormuz blockade while pushing allies to take on more responsibility. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普正在考虑针对伊朗的下一步行动。选项包括有限的军事打击。全面轰炸行动也在考虑范围内，但不太可能，因为它可能破坏该地区稳定并导致长期冲突。美国也可能尝试临时封锁霍尔木兹海峡，同时推动盟友承担更多责任。来源：《华尔街日报》
